THE WRAP UP TOOL
The Wrap Up Tool is designed to be used as one of the very last things you do before you and
your event attendees finish either a long session, an entire day or an entire event. It is designed to
help people acknowledge their breakthroughs while simutaneously reminding others of things
that they may have forgotten about. Then it holds you accountable to take action!
YOUR BIGGEST AH-HA MOMENTS growth tool
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
